productDisplayName: Fila Men's Mythos Black Red Shoe
description: This footwear look every bit stylish to the T. Pair it with denims and funky t-shirts to look your best.Upper Synthetic upper with perforations near the toe box for ventilation and enhanced durability Mesh tongue for soft feel on the upper foot Padded collar for superior shock absorption and snug Fit Embedded toe counter for longer shoe life and better protection for the forefoot area Midsole Lightweight EVA midsole for cushioning and shock absorption Outsole Wide herringbone pattern for superior grip arrow shaped patch with lugs for extra stability on smooth surfaces Wash careDo not machine washRub with soft cloth to clear off dust and dirt
